title: Arachnorchis stellata
taxonomy: Arachnorchis stellata is classified as a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae and is a part of the subfamily Orchidoideae. The genus Arachnorchis is a group of terrestrial orchids native to Australia. Within the Orchidaceae family, Arachnorchis stellata is placed in the tribe Diurideae. This classification reflects the unique characteristics and growth habits of the species.
